question: Will Revolut launch a US Dollar stablecoin in 2026? [Ṁ10k liquidity]
resolution_criteria: Announcement of launch is not sufficient to resolve this as Yes. The stablecoin needs to be publicly accessible and functional, where users can buy the stablecoin and freely transfer it. Whether the stablecoin is issued legally is immaterial. Closed-door testing, whether internal or with limited public-access, will not be sufficient to resolve the question.
